lastReleaseMessage: Admin-configurable shift options and a full visual polish...

barRaise.topFinding: Two operational HIGHs are sitting in plain sight while the product itself is shipping at a healthy clip. The Discord release webhook is committed to git history despite CLAUDE.md claiming it is gitignored. Separately, the new write-dashboard-status.ps1 hardcodes barRaise.* = null, so every release wipes the verdict this very bar-raise is about to write. Both are one-line fixes plus one rotation; neither is a product bug; both will keep biting until they are touched.
